title: Drodi's Villagers
description: Drodi’s Villagers tries to combine aesthetics and utility to make Villagers more visually interesting
body:
![e](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff9d10c9aad606dda8b9ef10b2f3440103360517_0.webp)

# Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)/[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) 


Drodi’s Villagers tries to combine aesthetics and utility to make _Villagers_ more visually interesting- best paired with **[Drodi's Illagers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-illagers)**! Might have to consult your Villagers, not sure they'll like it...

Your typical _Villager_ has been redesigned with the following changes:
- The level badge has been replaced with a belt buckle
- Every profession comes with distinct tools for easy recognition
- Professions that lacked headwear have been given one, like the Mason and Cleric
- _Baby Villagers_ now feature a pixel consistent model (model by Thanos)

Other features include:
- Redesigned _Iron Golems_ with bigger arms (axe crits still work :)
- Biome-based variations for _Wandering Traders_ and _Trader Llamas_
- Updated _Zombie Villagers_ to match the other mobs
- Texture tweaks here and there and multiple profession redesigns

For [**Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) compatibility [**Drodi's Villagers x Fresh Animations**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/drodis-villagers-fa) is available- make sure to follow the instructions!






</details>

The OFFICIAL versions of my packs are available here on Modrinth under the profile [@Drodi](https://modrinth.com/user/Drodi) and on Planet Minecraft under the profile [Drodi](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/drodi/). Any other source may contain viruses or malwares, so if you want to download from other sites, do so at your own risk.

If you believe someone else is reuploading my Ressource packs on other sources and action is possible, please contact me on discord (drodi99)
